prompt_text:
### Demographics: 37-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 85.2 kg; Height 161.2 cm; BMI 32.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.7%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 262mg/dL; 9 months ago 252mg/dL; 6 months ago 181mg/dL; 3 months ago 207mg/dL; current 145mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 87.3kg; 9 months ago 83.8kg; 6 months ago 79.8kg; 3 months ago 80.1kg; current 85.2kg), Height (12 months ago 161.2cm; 9 months ago 161.2cm; 6 months ago 161.2cm; 3 months ago 161.2cm; current 161.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 32.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 8.0U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 26U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 85mg/g; 9 months ago 133mg/g; 6 months ago 96mg/g; 3 months ago 145mg/g; current 90mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 35mg/dL; 3 months ago 34mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 151mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 168mg/dL; 3 months ago 148mg/dL; current 158mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
